title: BoardReadyOps generation recipe
description: Declarative recipe describing which first-party KiCad manufacturing outputs `boardreadyops generate` should produce.

schemaVersion.description: Recipe schema version. Only version 1 is supported.

outputDir.description: Directory, relative to the project root, that receives generated outputs. Defaults to build/boardreadyops-generate.

steps.description: Ordered list of output steps to produce.

kind.description: The manufacturing output this step produces.

enabled.description: Whether the step runs. Defaults to true.

output.description: Output path, relative to the recipe output directory. Defaults to a per-kind path. Gerber and drill outputs are directories; all other outputs are files.
